---
title: '2014/06/10 Journal Tue Fast day 4'
date: '2014-06-10T11:22:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2031712799507110450'
blogger_filename: '/2014/06/20140610-journal-tue-fast-day-4.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Journal'
---

<p>Juice Fasting has been interesting.</p>
<p>A. I'm experiencing desire for real food, but I'm not "hungry" per sey.</p>
<p>B. I'm already experiencing an uptick in physical energy. </p>
<p>C. I'm keenly aware of every restaurant I drive by.</p>
<p>D. Flavia and I had a day with no kids and could think of nothing to do but restaurants... so we got movies and came home... Now that I think about it, going for a walk could have been nice (except for the need to stay close to a restroom day 3...lol)</p>
<p>E. Still don't quite know what to blend today...</p>
<p><u>DW</u></p>
